item.title: USB Restore App [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Restore App [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
USB Restore App
(Utilities)
Easily usable compact flash drive data recovery software allows user to revive certainly erased missing precious text and document files from logically corrupted memory drive with scanning facility. Powerful USB Restore drive recovery tool is used to restore missing memorable photographs, audios, videos, photographs etc from corrupted USB physical storage devices very easily. Company website www.usbrestore.com offers memory stick regaining program that allows user to revive lost essential data files from virus infected USB memory drives in fewer mouse clicks.

[read more]

item.title: Recover File Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover File Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecove
item.itunes:summary:
Recover File Mac
(Utilities)
Professional Recover File Mac software provides the easiest way to restore deleted digital media files such as gif, bmp, jpg, jpeg, mpeg, mp3, mp4, png and wmv etc in most affordable and convenient manner without having you any previous technical knowledge or skill. Easy to operate Macintosh flash media data restoration tool rescue your accidentally deleted files and folders without affecting their original contents just in few easy steps.

item.itunes:author: myrecoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Windows NTFS File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Professional and simple to install partition data salvage tool easily works in major data loss conditions including formatted disk volumes, empty recycle bin, improper system shut down etc to revive lost files. Award winning Windows NTFS file Recovery Software safely rescue misplaced valuable pictures and other similar data in less time. Efficient data restore program for HDD enables common users to retrieve virus corrupted files without need of any special technical skill.

item.title: BusyTasks [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:title: BusyTasks [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:author: unknown-spirit
item.itunes:summary:
BusyTasks
(System Monitoring)
[b]Side (and sad) note:[/b]
In contrast to Unix, Windows is very obsessed with marking my program as malware. Of course, it is not. You may have to add BusyTasks to the list of exceptions in Microsoft Defender Antivirus before starting it.

This program uses several command line tools to receive its input. Please read the manual (see files) before installation!
Moreover, I'd be very grateful for any kind of feedback.

Isn't everything some kind of process? At least on a computer it is. So let's keep an eye on them. This program is a revival of my [URL=https://www.gnome-look.org/p/1002049/]BusyTasks plasmoid for the KDE4 desktop[/URL]. Due to several issues with KDE5 I decided to switch to java and give it one more chance to live and prosper there. It uses several programs to get its input. The collected data is neither unique nor new, but the idea to clearly sum it up in one single program is. This task monitor displays up to four different tasks, each with different priority.
BusyTasks is only useful if it is always visible (e.g. residing on a panel) If you had got to minimize windows or show the desktop to have a glance on it you could equally start the system monitor.
I recommend splitting up the taskbar, putting it in between and setting it up as a scheduled task.

The Linux version for java is outdated, I recommend using my KDE Plasmoid called [url=https://www.pling.com/find?search=BusyTasks]BusyTasksPlasmoid[/url].
For the moment this program is only released for Windows.
[read more]
item.description:
BusyTasks
(System Monitoring)
[b]Side (and sad) note:[/b]
In contrast to Unix, Windows is very obsessed with marking my program as malware. Of course, it is not. You may have to add BusyTasks to the list of exceptions in Microsoft Defender Antivirus before starting it.

This program uses several command line tools to receive its input. Please read the manual (see files) before installation!
Moreover, I'd be very grateful for any kind of feedback.

Isn't everything some kind of process? At least on a computer it is. So let's keep an eye on them. This program is a revival of my [URL=https://www.gnome-look.org/p/1002049/]BusyTasks plasmoid for the KDE4 desktop[/URL]. Due to several issues with KDE5 I decided to switch to java and give it one more chance to live and prosper there. It uses several programs to get its input. The collected data is neither unique nor new, but the idea to clearly sum it up in one single program is. This task monitor displays up to four different tasks, each with different priority.
BusyTasks is only useful if it is always visible (e.g. residing on a panel) If you had got to minimize windows or show the desktop to have a glance on it you could equally start the system monitor.
I recommend splitting up the taskbar, putting it in between and setting it up as a scheduled task.

The Linux version for java is outdated, I recommend using my KDE Plasmoid called [url=https://www.pling.com/find?search=BusyTasks]BusyTasksPlasmoid[/url].
For the moment this program is only released for Windows.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
BusyTasks
(System Monitoring)
[b]Side (and sad) note:[/b]
In contrast to Unix, Windows is very obsessed with marking my program as malware. Of course, it is not. You may have to add BusyTasks to the list of exceptions in Microsoft Defender Antivirus before starting it.

This program uses several command line tools to receive its input. Please read the manual (see files) before installation!
Moreover, I'd be very grateful for any kind of feedback.

Isn't everything some kind of process? At least on a computer it is. So let's keep an eye on them. This program is a revival of my [URL=https://www.gnome-look.org/p/1002049/]BusyTasks plasmoid for the KDE4 desktop[/URL]. Due to several issues with KDE5 I decided to switch to java and give it one more chance to live and prosper there. It uses several programs to get its input. The collected data is neither unique nor new, but the idea to clearly sum it up in one single program is. This task monitor displays up to four different tasks, each with different priority.
BusyTasks is only useful if it is always visible (e.g. residing on a panel) If you had got to minimize windows or show the desktop to have a glance on it you could equally start the system monitor.
I recommend splitting up the taskbar, putting it in between and setting it up as a scheduled task.

The Linux version for java is outdated, I recommend using my KDE Plasmoid called [url=https://www.pling.com/find?search=BusyTasks]BusyTasksPlasmoid[/url].
For the moment this program is only released for Windows.
[read more]

item.title: Something for Poco F3/Redmi k40/Mi 11x [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Something for Poco F3/Redmi k40/Mi 11x [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: xeesan
item.itunes:summary:
Something for Poco F3/Redmi k40/Mi 11x
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
a fork of AOSPA, with extra features and a brand new design
Like a asteroid or a minor planet orbiting around AOSPA
SomethingOS do not pretend to be better than any other, take that fits you the best and if you decide to install Something, thank you !
[read more]

item.title: Removable Media Data Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Removable Media Data Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Removable Media Data Restore
(Utilities)
www.usbrestore.com provides complete solution to renovate mistakenly delete files due to all spoil infection present in computer system. Data restore tool is technically most advance program that use advance file recovery algorithms to easily search and locate missing/deleted files in very less time. Removable Media Data Restore Software works easily on your system to recover virus corrupted files and folders according to all end user needs. External hard drive data restore tool provide non-destructive and cost effective solution to renovate crucial files and their contents in minimum time duration from system. Removable Media Data Restore application smoothly works with all drives like Sony, Toshiba, Canon, Kodak, Nikon, Transcend, Panasonic, HP, Kingston etc. USB digital media restore program provide complete as well as best solution to quick recovers system screenshots or wallpaper in minimum interval of time. File Salvage application is most widely used in business industries to restore corrupted/damage valuable text files in few times. Data recovery software provides best preview facility to view all recovered contents on desktop screen without any special guidance. File recovery tool is comprehensive solution to easily recover mistakenly deleted or formatted drives due to improper device handling. Instant file restore program is capable to get back all misplace images within short span of time.Features:- *Removable Media Data Restore Software provides an easiest and simplest method to recover mistakenly deleted files in very short time.* Software takes less turnaround time to handle and recovers all corrupted, damage, spoil and viruses infected files.* Data restore application recover contents even if files permanently deleted due to shift + delete operational keys from system.*Software provides best alternatives to regain missing/misplace official data in just short interval of time from system.

[read more]

item.title: Recover USB Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover USB Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: myrecoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Recover USB Drive
(Utilities)
Advance USB media play important role to transfer digital data from one disk to another storage device. Digital data can be damage by any reason including human mistake, power failure, accidently format pen drive and corrupted removal disk. Windows compatible USB recovery software regenerates misplaced important file in specific way without loss of single bit of information. Removable media data recovery utility has capability to rescue forever misplaced entire corrupted file from any secondary storage device. Expert USB files restoration application provides user friendly environment to quickly revive crucial images without need to go any digital data recovery center. Only by installing Recover USB program in personal computer system you can reestablish entire mistakenly delete important document and graphic. Reliable removable media data recovery utility is an affordable restoring product that any level of organization member can easily buy this file retrieving product. USB data reconstruct tool supports all major brand as PNY, Kingston, San Disk, Olympus, HP, Transcend, Sony, Moser bear and more other brands. USB Drive Data restoring program provides resave option to get back forever damage data from USB Memory disk in very less effort and money. Simple and easy removal recovery application has scanning technique to easily locate the reports, document and important project files. Feature: * Expert Removable media data restore application gets back audio and video file, memorable pictures, exe files from USB inaccessible media in very less time and effort. * Recover USB tool is Safe, cost effective, easy to use and window supporting operation system software. * Superior digital data regain software will repair your lost valuable files and folders erased due to any logical reason. * Software will reestablish your files as original situation as that was before corrupted without help by technical assistant for operating Recover USB driver tool.

[read more]

item.title: How to Recover Deleted Files from a Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: How to Recover Deleted Files from a Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecove
item.itunes:summary:
How to Recover Deleted Files from a Mac
(Utilities)
How to Recover Deleted Files from a Mac application offers dynamic platform to restore deleted photographs from fixed as well as removable storage media in less time and affords. Software is easy to use and supports rich graphical user interface to efficiently restore missing data without requiring technical knowledge. Mac picture rescue utility offers excellent preview facility so that users can restore files and folders as per their choice.
[read more]

item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware

Visit most famous company website www.usbrestore.com and download Mobile Phone Data Restore application that provides quick regaining of accidently missed digital pictures, mp3, mp4 songs and other precious data files/folders from transportable mobile phone internal memory in low span of time. Compatible to Windows operating system mobile files restoration utility gives affordable procedure to regain missed memorable photographs from mobile device memory by using inbuilt advanced disk scanning mechanism.

item.title: Recovery Software Freeware [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recovery Software Freeware [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: myrecoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Recovery Software Freeware
(Utilities)
Flash drive data recovery freeware is best and prominently used backup product as it undelete intentionally or unintentionally deleted pictures, recorded contents, zip, rar, digital photos, high quality images and significant text files from inaccessible USB pen drive removable media. Users of thumb drive data regaining software experiences features of most powerful backup program that regains significant information even in condition when common system generated errors like drive not formatted is displayed on your computer while accessing USB removable media on personal computer or laptop. Memory stick data salvage application is perfectly suitable for all levels of users whether novice, professional etc as it provides features of retrieving actual information lost hence assuring privacy as well as integrity of information. Keychain drive data rescue application is greatly accepted and implemented due to its standard features like compatibility with all major pen drive manufacturing brands like SanDisk, Transcend, Kingston, Sony, Nikon, Canon, Toshiba, SanDisk, super flash, IBM, Memorex etc. Jump drive data repair product supports all types of pen drives like pen drive duo, pen drive Bluetooth etc. Features: * Handy drive data retrieval software takes low space on hard disk as well as runs on less system memory thereby does not degrades performance of personal computer or laptop. * USB smart drive data salvage utility is compatible with Microsoft Windows based operating system like Windows 11, Windows 10 ,Windows 8, * Pocket drive data salvage software is user friendly to all users with interactive GUI and is available with 24/7 technical support. * Memory stick data salvage application assists user to restore lost information on your own with do it yourself recovery feature in just few mouse clicks.

[read more]

Users of thumb drive data regaining software experiences features of most powerful backup program that regains significant information even in condition when common system generated errors like drive not formatted is displayed on your computer while accessing USB removable media on personal computer or laptop. [read more]
